sentences.target: Ich sehe eine Spur im frischen Schnee.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzeːə ˈaɪ̯nə ʃpuːɐ̯ ɪm ˈfʁɪʃən ʃneː/

translations.de: Ich sehe eine Spur im frischen Schnee.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzeːə ˈaɪ̯nə ʃpuːɐ̯ ɪm ˈfʁɪʃən ʃneː/
translations.en: I see a trail in the fresh snow.
translations.es: Veo un rastro en la nieve fresca.
translations.fr: Je vois une trace dans la neige fraîche.
translations.it: Vedo una traccia nella neve fresca.
translations.ko: 새로 내린 눈 위에 흔적이 보여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在新雪上看到一串脚印。
translations.yue: 我喺新落嘅雪上面見到一串腳印。
translations.ru: Я вижу след на свежем снегу.
translations.pt: Vejo um rastro na neve fresca.
translations.tr: Yeni yağan karda bir iz görüyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một dấu vết trên tuyết mới rơi.
translations.nl: Ik zie een spoor in de verse sneeuw.
translations.uk: Я бачу слід на свіжому снігу.
translations.hi: मुझे ताज़ी बर्फ पर एक निशान दिख रहा है.
translations.el: Βλέπω ένα ίχνος στο φρέσκο χιόνι.
translations.nb: Jeg ser et spor i nysnøen.
translations.id: Aku melihat jejak di salju yang baru turun.
translations.sv: Jag ser ett spår i den nyfallna snön.
translations.ro: Văd o urmă în zăpada proaspătă.
translations.da: Jeg ser et spor i den nyfaldne sne.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Spur'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of 'sehe'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'), governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Schnee'; dative masculine singular form agreeing with the noun under a definite article.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Du bleibst bitte in der Spur.

translations.de: Du bleibst bitte in der Spur.
translations.es: Por favor, mantente en el carril.
translations.fr: S'il te plaît, reste dans la voie.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, hold deg i feltet.
translations.cs: Prosím, drž se v jízdním pruhu.
translations.ja: 車線内にいてください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; intransitive, complemented by a locative PP.
Politeness marker/interjection; discourse particle that softens the command without affecting argument structure.
Preposition; here takes dative to express static location; introduces the PP.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Spur'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Ich schmecke eine Spur Zimt im Kuchen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃmɛkə ˈaɪ̯nə ʃpuːɐ̯ tsɪmt ɪm ˈkuːxən/

translations.de: Ich schmecke eine Spur Zimt im Kuchen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃmɛkə ˈaɪ̯nə ʃpuːɐ̯ tsɪmt ɪm ˈkuːxən/
translations.en: I taste a hint of cinnamon in the cake.
translations.es: Noto un toque de canela en el pastel.
translations.fr: Je sens une pointe de cannelle dans le gâteau.
translations.it: Sento un accenno di cannella nella torta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我尝到蛋糕里一点点肉桂味。
translations.yue: 我食到蛋糕有少少肉桂味。
translations.ru: Я чувствую нотку корицы в торте.
translations.pt: Sinto um toque de canela no bolo.
translations.tr: Kekte hafif bir tarçın tadı alıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi cảm nhận chút vị quế trong bánh.
translations.nl: Ik proef een vleugje kaneel in de cake.
translations.uk: Я відчуваю легку нотку кориці в торті.
translations.hu: Érzek egy kis fahéjat a sütiben.
translations.hi: मुझे केक में हल्की सी दालचीनी का स्वाद आता है.
translations.el: Νιώθω μια ελαφριά γεύση κανέλας στο κέικ.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner et hint av kanel i kaken.
translations.id: Aku merasakan sedikit rasa kayu manis di kue.
translations.sv: Jag känner en hint av kanel i kakan.
translations.ro: Simt o notă de scorțișoară în prăjitură.
translations.da: Jeg kan smage et strejf af kanel i kagen.
translations.ja: ケーキからほんのりシナモンの味がする。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive with an experiencer subject; takes a direct object and a locative PP.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Spur'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; head of the measured NP functioning as direct object.
Common noun, masculine; bare nominal complement specifying the substance/type of 'Spur' (measure/genitive-like complement, no article).
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'), governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Die Polizei folgt einer Spur zum Bahnhof.
sentences.reading: /diː pɔliˈtsaɪ̯ fɔlkt ˈaɪ̯nɐ ʃpuːɐ̯ tsʊm ˈbaːnhoːf/

translations.de: Die Polizei folgt einer Spur zum Bahnhof.
translations.ipa: /diː pɔliˈtsaɪ̯ fɔlkt ˈaɪ̯nɐ ʃpuːɐ̯ tsʊm ˈbaːnhoːf/
translations.en: The police follow a clue to the station.
translations.es: La policía sigue una pista hasta la estación.
translations.fr: La police suit une piste jusqu'à la gare.
translations.it: La polizia segue una pista fino alla stazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 警方顺着线索追到车站。
translations.yue: 警方沿住線索追到車站。
translations.ru: Полиция идёт по следу к вокзалу.
translations.pt: A polícia segue uma pista até a estação.
translations.he: המשטרה עוקבת אחרי רמז עד התחנה.
translations.tr: Polis bir ipucunun peşinden istasyona gidiyor.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát lần theo manh mối đến nhà ga.
translations.nl: De politie volgt een spoor naar het station.
translations.uk: Поліція йде по сліду до вокзалу.
translations.hu: A rendőrség egy nyomot követ az állomásig.
translations.hi: पुलिस एक सुराग के पीछे-पीछे स्टेशन तक जाती है.
translations.el: Η αστυνομία ακολουθεί ένα ίχνος μέχρι τον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Politiet følger et spor til stasjonen.
translations.id: Polisi mengikuti sebuah petunjuk sampai ke stasiun.
translations.sv: Polisen följer ett spår till stationen.
translations.ro: Poliția urmează o pistă până la gară.
translations.da: Politiet følger et spor til stationen.
translations.ja: 警察は手がかりをたどって駅へ向かう。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Polizei'.
Common noun, feminine, nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects a dative object ('einer Spur') and a directional PP.
Indefinite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Spur'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; dative object licensed by 'folgt'.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu dem'), governs dative; introduces a directional PP indicating goal.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'zum'.
